summary: BOM Explosion → Requerimiento MP feature testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All RequerimientoTab UI elements verified working correctly including 4 summary cards, table with correct columns, deficit highlighting in red, and Regenerar button.

issues: Minor: 'Explosión BOM basada en ? prendas planificadas' shows '?' instead of actual count - should show 500

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} - generates requerimiento MP from BOM
Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} with regenerar=true - replaces existing requerimiento
Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} for closed order - returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} without BOM - returns 404 error
Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} with existing requerimiento (no regenerar) - returns 409 conflict
Backend: POST /api/bom/explosion/{orden_id} for order without tallas - returns 400 error
Backend: Calculation validated: cantidad_requerida = cantidad_total_bom * total_prendas (772.5 = 1.545 * 500)
Backend: Deficit calculation correct: deficit = max(0, requerido - stock)
Backend: SERVICIO lines excluded from requerimiento_mp (only TELA/AVIO/EMPAQUE)
Backend: GET /api/bom/requerimiento/{orden_id} - returns items with stock_actual, deficit, costo_estimado
Backend: GET /api/bom/requerimiento/{orden_id} - all required fields present
Backend: Non-regression - GET /api/reportes/wip still works
Backend: Non-regression - GET /api/reportes/mp-valorizado still works
Backend: Non-regression - GET /api/reportes/pt-valorizado still works
Frontend: Login works with eduard/eduard123
Frontend: Navigate to Registros -> click order with 500 piezas -> Materia Prima tab -> Requerimiento sub-tab
Frontend: 4 summary cards displayed (Materiales=3, Costo=S/11538.75, Déficit=3, Reservado=0.00)
Frontend: Table shows columns: Tipo, Item, Talla, Requerido, Stock, Déficit, Costo Est., Estado
Frontend: Items with deficit (3) shown with red background highlighting
Frontend: Regenerar button present and functional
Frontend: Merma % shown below item name (+2.0%, +5.0%, +3.0%)
action_items: Minor: Fix 'Explosión BOM basada en ? prendas planificadas' to show actual total_prendas value (500) instead of '?'
critical_code_review_comments: BOM explosion endpoint correctly excludes SERVICIO type from requerimiento_mp
Deficit calculation is correct: max(0, cantidad_requerida - stock_actual)
cantidad_requerida calculation is correct: cantidad_total_bom (with merma) * total_prendas
Frontend displays deficit items with bg-red-50 class for visual highlighting
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Order b4d2080f (n_corte=10, 500 prendas), BOM-JEAN-CLASS-V2 (APROBADO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOM Explosion feature fully functional. Order b4d2080f-9e01-4380-ba54-809b1da8f2fa has 3 requerimiento lines generated from BOM-JEAN-CLASS-V2. Tallas: 28=100, 30=150, 32=150, 34=100 (total 500 prendas). BOM items: Tela Algodón (1.5m/prenda +3% merma), Denim (0.8m/prenda +5% merma), Boton (4/prenda +2% merma). All 3 items have deficit. RequerimientoTab in RegistroDetalleFase2.jsx correctly integrates with /api/bom/explosion and /api/bom/requerimiento endpoints.

error_handling.no_bom: Returns 404 when no BOM exists for modelo
error_handling.no_tallas: Returns 400 when order has no tallas defined
error_handling.conflict: Returns 409 when requerimiento exists without regenerar flag

backend_api.servicio_exclusion: SERVICIO lines not included in requerimiento_mp, only in servicios_estandar

frontend_ui.navigation: Registros -> Order dialog -> Materia Prima tab -> Requerimiento sub-tab
frontend_ui.deficit_highlighting: Rows with deficit > 0 have bg-red-50 background
frontend_ui.regenerar_button: Button text changes to 'Regenerar' when items exist
